name: Mayor & City Council
description: The Mayor and City Council are the elected governing body of the City of Aberdeen, responsible for setting policy, approving the budget, and representing the interests of residents.

name: Police Department
description: The Aberdeen Police Department is dedicated to protecting and serving the residents and visitors of Aberdeen through professional, community-oriented policing.

name: Public Works
description: The Department of Public Works maintains city infrastructure including roads, water and sewer systems, and public facilities.

name: Finance & Treasury
description: The Finance Department manages the city's budget, financial reporting, tax collection, and online payment services.

name: Planning & Community Development
description: Planning & Community Development oversees land use, zoning, building permits, and long-range planning for the city's growth and development.

name: City Clerk
description: The City Clerk's office manages official city records, meeting agendas and minutes, elections, and public information requests.

name: City Manager
description: The City Manager oversees the day-to-day operations of all city departments and implements policies set by the Mayor and City Council.

name: Economic Development
description: Economic Development promotes business growth, attraction, and retention in Aberdeen, supporting a vibrant local economy.

name: Human Resources
description: Human Resources manages city employee recruitment, benefits, training, and personnel policies.
